texto: Religion and political cartoons, as you may have heard, make a difficult couple, ever since that day of 2005, when a bunch of cartoonists in Denmark drew cartoons that had repercussions all over the world - demonstrations, fatwa, they provoked violence. People died in the violence.
explicacao: Citação de Patrick Chappatte sobre temas ligados a fe. “Religion and political cartoons, as you may have heard, make a difficult couple, ever since that …” articula fe, day, world em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como world e violence.
